metadata.document_title: Unjani Clinic Network — Complete Site Register with ISP Cross-Reference
notes: v3.1: Updated OPEX from blended R658 to complete R786.46 (incl Teraco NNI, Echo SP CaaS, AgilityGIS BSS)

thinkwifi_performance.top_performer: Barcelona (R889 gross ad rev, R1 053 CT total)
thinkwifi_performance.key_finding: With complete OPEX of R786/site (incl Teraco NNI, Echo SP CaaS, BSS), network average is R152/site below breakeven. Only Barcelona and Soshanguve are cash-positive. Breakeven requires R396 gross ad revenue (current avg R217).
thinkwifi_performance.avg_opex_detail: R499 MTN + R55 Echo CaaS + R11 BSS + R63 Teraco NNI + R99 NOC + R60 field
